Reviews Contact

Elevate Your Columbus Home with Timeless Flooring

Expert flooring solutions designed for Ohio's climate. Transforming homes from German Village to Dublin with durable, beautiful surfaces.

Call Now: 555-flo-r91

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Crafting Floors That Stand the Test of Time

Founded in 2012, Summit Flooring has become Columbus' trusted name for flooring that withstands our freeze-thaw winters and humid summers. Our team grew up in Central Ohio and understands how clay soil shifts and ice dams impact homes.

Learn More About Us
Since 2014 Established
Locally Owned

Our Flooring Services

Professional flooring solutions tailored to your needs.

Hardwood Floor Installation

Solid and engineered hardwood solutions built for Ohio's seasonal changes.

Learn More →

Luxury Vinyl Plank

Waterproof flooring perfect for basements and active households.

Learn More →

Tile Flooring

Durable ceramic and porcelain for wet areas and high-traffic zones.

Learn More →

Carpet Installation

Premium carpets with moisture-resistant backings for Ohio homes.

Learn More →

Floor Refinishing

Breathing new life into worn hardwood throughout Central Ohio.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our flooring services.

Can you match my home's original 1940s hardwood?

We maintain a specialty millwork shop that replicates 20th century plank dimensions and grain patterns. Bring a sample to our showroom for perfect matching.

How does your installation differ for ranch homes?

1960s ranches often require subfloor reinforcement before installation. We add cross-bracing in crawl spaces to prevent flexing that causes cracks.

Reviews From Our Flooring Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Summit restored the original 1937 oak floors in our German Village home. They replicated missing boards perfectly and used a period-appropriate finish that matches our archways. Six winters later - no gaps or squeaks!"

Megan T. Hardwood Floor Installation

"Our Dublin basement flooded last spring. Summit installed LVP that looks like real walnut but handles moisture perfectly. The textured surface prevents slips when coming in from the pool area."

James W. Luxury Vinyl Plank

"The freeze-thaw rated tile in our Westerville mudroom has survived two polar vortexes without cracking. They matched the original 1920s hex pattern in the adjoining bathroom flawlessly."

Lisa H. Tile Flooring
